title: invisible spider
description: resource pack that makes spider and cavespider invisible(transparent texture)
body:
A very simple resource pack that edits cave_spider (spider eyes) and spider texture to transparent one, This makes the spiders invisible. 

![invisible spider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2S728Skl/images/4f5238f7f9cf67ecd732eff877f74200825ef52b.png)


(the shadows remain unless shaders are on)
its mostly designed for people with arachnophobia , althought similar resourcepacks exist they all seem to use optfine custom entity settings.

This resource pack does not require optifine to work, and can be used from 1.6.1 to 25w45a version. (it also works with optifine custom entity on but its not required for it to work)

should be compaitable with any mods.

(resource pack does not work for 1.42 and older but a lot of old versions are compatible.)

recommended using jade mod to see spider hud text above entity.

(ignore broken resource pack warning.)
